_comment: Cal.com booking tools for Drew (Plant City). WIRED LIVE 2026-07-06 — copied verbatim from the existing Retell agent 'LaSalle Tech | Drew' (LLM llm_041218816fc635d280d96a75f965) into the new agent's LLM llm_312fa160e0e74ed3a382e8a4b599 via api.retellai.com PATCH. Same event_type_id (3159259) + same cal_api_keys, so bookings land on the same Plant City calendar. Named check_availability / book_appointment to match Drew's prompt. Kept end_call. Houma + Baton Rouge get their own tools once those Cal.com calendars exist.
_status: LIVE on llm_312fa160e0e74ed3a382e8a4b599 (Plant City). check_availability + book_appointment both present alongside end_call.

general_tools_added.name: check_availability
general_tools_added.description: When users ask for availability, check the calendar and provide available slots.

general_tools_added.name: book_appointment
general_tools_added.description: When users ask to book an appointment, book it on the calendar.

_how_to_add: Option A (Retell dashboard): open Drew's agent -> its Retell LLM -> Functions -> Add function -> choose the Cal.com 'Check Calendar Availability' and 'Book on the Calendar' tools, paste the Cal.com API key + Plant City event type id, name them exactly 'check_availability' and 'book_appointment'.

Option B (API, e.g. via Claude-in-Chrome from a dashboard.retellai.com tab): GET https://api.retellai.com/get-retell-llm/{llm_id}, then PATCH https://api.retellai.com/update-retell-llm/{llm_id} with general_tools = the EXISTING end_call tool PLUS the two objects in 'general_tools_to_add' above (general_tools is replace-all, so keep end_call).
After adding, place a test call and confirm Drew can read open slots and book one on the Plant City calendar.
_houma_baton_rouge_later: When you send the Houma and Baton Rouge Cal.com calendars, we add a second pair of tools (e.g. check_availability_houma / book_appointment_houma) with those event type ids and update the prompt's booking rules so Drew books live for those campuses too. Until then the prompt routes LA campuses to a human admissions-rep hand-off.
